arts.ttl: FPL notes: Jackson + Palmer star, leaky Villa, Amazing Amad
arts.sum: We look back on Chelsea 3-0 Aston Villa and Man Utd 4-0 Everton The post FPL notes: Jackson + Palmer star, leaky Villa, Amazing Amad appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Chelsea injury news: Enzo Maresca left ruing Wesley Fofana blow in win over Aston Villa
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca reveals the length of time in which he expects Wesley Fofana to be absent after the centre-back sustained an injury against Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Revealed: Chelsea have 'concrete interest' in key Man Utd target
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly hold “concrete interest” in Sporting CP wonderkid Geovany Quenda, who has been heavily linked with a move to Manchester United in recent weeks. Quenda’s current release clause at Sporting CP stands at €100 million, but Man Utd are preparing a €60m offer for the 17-year-old, as per Portuguese outlet A Bola .

arts.ttl: Chelsea's Cole Palmer pokes fun at Morgan Rogers on social media after Aston Villa defeat
arts.sum: In the screenshot, which was posted to Palmer's official Instagram page, Rogers wrote: "No goals against Villa." The Chelsea star then responded: "Player of match [award] is comin[g] back with me." Not long after full-time, Palmer posted an image of his man-of-the-match award alongside a screenshot of the conversation to rub salt into the wounds of his close pal.

arts.ttl: Can Liverpool be caught? Neville assesses Arsenal, Chelsea, Man City hopes
arts.sum: Gary Neville says Liverpool are now "strong favourites" to win this season's Premier League title after a 2-0 win in Sunday's showdown with champions Manchester City, who he believes must now undergo a rebuild under Pep Guardiola.

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer reveals cheeky conversation with Morgan Rogers before his man-of-the-match winning performance in Chelsea's win over Aston Villa
arts.sum: Following the game Palmer revealed that the two England internationals had engaged in some pre-match banter over Snapchat earlier this week.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca delivers Premier League title verdict after Chelsea victory over Aston Villa
arts.sum: After a comfortable 3-0 win over Aston Villa, Enzo Maresca was asked about Chelsea's Premier League title challenge.

arts.ttl: 'I love': Jason Cundy claims two Chelsea players formed a fantastic relationship vs Aston Villa
arts.sum: Chelsea finish the weekend sitting third in the Premier League table after a comprehensive home win over Aston Villa. Chelsea have returned after the November...

arts.ttl: Arsenal & Chelsea dealt transfer blow despite 'initial talks'
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea are among the clubs to have initiated talks with Borussia Dortmund winger Jamie Gittens, according to reports in Germany. Arsenal and Chelsea may therefore be required to end their pursuit of Gittens for now, despite initiating talks with his representatives in recent weeks.

arts.ttl: 'We're not ready' - Maresca downplays Chelsea title chances
arts.sum: Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca claims his team are not ready to challenge for the Premier League title, despite sitting third after a comfortable 3-0 against Aston Villa at Stamford Bridge.
